body.title: uuquestions: CLI to surface tickets/decisions with open design questions
body.result: uuquestions.py + ~/bin/uuquestions: shows open_questions tickets (❓ + first Q) and design tickets (📐). --questions-only/--design-only flags.
body.intention: I intend that uuquestions lets Akien triage design items without burning CC tokens — shows all tickets in design status plus any ticket with a '## Questions' section in its description.
body.description:
`uuquestions` — surface tickets with unanswered design questions.

Primary query: `status = 'open_questions'` (tickets where Q1:/Q2: exist without A1:/A2: answers — Akien sets this status when adding questions).

Secondary: `status = 'design'` (design not yet started).

Compact output format:
  `❓ T-id (size) — title`
  `  Q1: <first question>`

Bash function in ~/.bashrc → lab/claudecode/uuquestions.py.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/uuquestions.py, ~/.bashrc
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; Postgres only (clan.memories)
**Scope boundary:** IN: query status=open_questions and status=design. OUT: editing questions, showing full ticket body (that's uushowticket).
**Completion criteria:** `uuquestions` shows tickets with status=open_questions, prefixed ❓. Returns exit 0 with '(none)' when none found. Shows first Q1: line as preview.
